"'''From ''Heir'' to ''Last Command'''''" is an interview published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]] in [[February]] [[1994]] in which [[Timothy Zahn]] discussed the process of writing [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|the Thrawn Trilogy]] with [[Ilene Rosenberg]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

==Contents==
The article is an interview between Ilene Rosenberg and Timothy Zahn about his conception of the Thrawn Trilogy. Topics covered include Zahn's connection to ''Star Wars'' and George Lucas, as well as his approach to recreating the tone of the original trilogy in his novels. Additionally, Zahn shares insights into the development of his original characters.
